race.comment: Open race to close out the card. GALPIN (5) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Draws nicely for this from gate three and it's hard to knock mares in form. Rates the testing material. WINCHMAN (4) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed a drum three times in 20 career outings and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Should be ready for the step-up in trip now and has to be included. The well-related TRIBBIANI (6) (half to 3xG1 winner Explosive Jack) has a win and two placings from five spins around this circuit and is more than capable enough on his day. Top-three credentials. DESTINYS SUMMIT (9) will be ready to peak now third-up and may earn some minor money. ROCK HARD LOVE (2) best of the rest while fresh.
